summary: Raw gaggle/pool-spray footage of President Trump talking to reporters aboard Air Force One about visiting President Xi's residence and U.S.-China relations. All frames are the same handheld shot of Trump in the cabin doorway surrounded by reporters with microphones. It is unedited spoken remarks with a talking transcript and no musical or cinematic styling, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: None (raw gaggle); tweet quote: "It's a very positive thing to have these two nations getting along."
